creator: kib@FreeBSD.org
text: I have some WIP but it is far from being able to drive the hardware.  The current state is that I have attachments for the power controller, added code which understands location of the TCO registers in SMBUS but the stumbling block is to correctly reserve TCO window in rman.  It is already reserved by motherboard PNP0C02 on the server where I debug this.
